_comment: Content creator config — core plugins plus publishing, design, social, SEO, email, voice, and translation. Ideal for writers, bloggers, and newsletter authors.
personaBlurb: A creative assistant for writing, publishing, and audience growth.
_comment_plugins: Core plugins plus: substack (newsletter publishing), blog (static site management), designer (image generation via Gemini), social (cross-platform posting), seo (search optimization), email (inbox triage and outreach), voice (text-to-speech), translate (multilingual content).
_comment_ghToken: Required by mc-board for issue sync. Get one at https://github.com/settings/tokens (scope: repo).
_comment_email: Required by mc-email. Use an app password, not your main password. Gmail: https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords
_comment_gemini: Required by mc-designer for image generation. Get a key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
_comment_voice: Required by mc-voice for text-to-speech. Get a key at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
_comment_optional: anthropicToken powers the LLM runtime. Can also be set via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.
